result: Verified 15 clauses via MCP. Result: 5 confirmed (F-002, F-003, F-007, F-008, F-009, F-015 — semantic match with actual п.10.3.2 / 6.1.6 / 10.3.14 texts; partial coverage noted) and 9 mismatches (F-010, F-011, F-012, F-016, F-017, F-018, F-021, F-022, F-024 — cited clause numbers refer to different topics or merge content from adjacent paragraphs). File written to `norm_checks_llm_1.json`.
